Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze repeated activities within each case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Repeating ones Verify Documents appears multiple times in C001 positions after Initiate after Submit Additional and in C003 after Initiate after Adjust Account

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Call Customer repeats in C002 only first outbound call to clarify account discrepancy then follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus need to rename Verify Documents and Call Customer where they appear multiple times in same case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C001 Verify Documents first initial verification of identity documents after Initiate Request before first call Context initial identity verification Verify Documents second re check after customer submitted additional ID scan after Submit Additional Context verification after receiving missing docs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus rename perhaps Initial Document Verification and Post Submission Document Verification

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C003 Verify Documents first initial verification of physical ID at branch after Initiate Request walk in Context physical verification Verify Documents second re verification after account adjustment after Adjust Account Context verification after internal correction

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus rename Branch ID Verification initial and Post Adjustment Document Verification

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C002 Call Customer first outbound call to clarify account discrepancy after initial Verify Docs Context clarification call Call Customer second followup call to confirm adjustments after Adjust Account Context confirmation call

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus rename Clarification Call to Customer and Confirmation Call After Adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Adjust Account appears in C002 and C003 each once Submit Additional appears only in C001

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since they do not repeat within a case they do not require contextual renaming under the stated task
